events.description: Tech/Research/Sect deep-dive. Found 2 critical wiring holes the surface scan missed: (F-1) all 12 sect technologies are silently inert because FactionSectState.SetTechFlag has zero callers; (F-2) sect adoption never applies to newly trained units because SectEffectSystem.ApplySectEffectsToUnit is defined but never called. Plus 8 lower-severity findings. Surface-scan verification: 4 of 12 T-* / MB-27/28 claims are real bugs (T-3 perf, T-4 critical SetTechFlag, T-9 cosmetic, T-10 low perf); 8 are refuted or design-correct.
